name: GKE cluster master endpoint is publicly accessible
description: The GKE cluster's Kubernetes API server (master endpoint) is accessible from the public internet. Exposure of the Kubernetes API server enables brute-force attacks, credential stuffing, and exploitation of API server vulnerabilities.
remediation: Enable the private cluster feature to deploy the master endpoint in a VPC. Enable master authorized networks to restrict access to specific CIDR ranges. Use Cloud VPN or Cloud Interconnect for internal access.
